subject: Quote for window decals
body:
Hi there,

I'm looking to get some window decals made for our cafe. We have three windows at the front. Could you give me a quote?

Thanks,
Sarah

subject: Revision on the truck wrap design
body:
Hey,

The proof looks great but I need to change the phone number. It should be 555-0192 not 555-0129. Also can we make the logo slightly bigger?

Thanks,
Mike

subject: Proof looks good — approved
body:
Hi,

Just reviewed the proof for the event banners and everything looks great. You're good to go ahead and print.

Thanks,
Linda

subject: SPECIAL OFFER: 40% off vinyl rolls this week only!
body:
Dear Print Shop Owner,

Don't miss our biggest sale of the year! 40% off all vinyl rolls, laminates, and substrates. Limited time offer. Click here to shop now.

PrintSuppliesPlus Team

subject: Banner for graduation — need 50 pieces, 4x8 ft, by April 10
body:
Hello Focus Graphics,

We need 50 banners printed for our graduation ceremony. Each should be 4 feet by 8 feet. We need them by April 10th. They'll hang outdoors so need to be weather resistant.

Please let me know the cost.

James Okafor
Rise Academy
